jsonLd.title: PayU is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at PayU are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PayU:
PayU is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
